project_type: React + TypeScript + Vite board game app
verification_instructions: Run npx vite build and confirm zero errors
environment_constraints: node_modules already present, no npm install needed
contribution_requirements: Work directly on main branch, commit when done
key_patterns: Single large App.css with all styles (minified sections). Components in src/components/. Game types in src/types/game.ts. RegionDetailModal has a getFigureForce helper that calculates individual figure force values - reuse this pattern for tooltips.
directory_structure: src/App.css (all styles), src/components/ (React components), src/types/game.ts (types and card data), src/utils/gameLogic.ts (game logic)
